title: Russell Hobbs Inspire 4 Slice Toaster (Extra wide slots, High lift feature, 6 Browning levels, Frozen/Cancel/Reheat function with Blue LED illumination, 1800W, White textured high gloss) 24380
features: Inspiring premium plastic high-gloss textured design complemented by sleek chrome Accents with soft illumination on buttons while in use
Lift and look feature, so you can check on the browning of your toast without cancelling the cycle
Variable browning control and cancel function for personal toasting preference
High lift feature ensures safe removal of smaller items such as crumpets, tea cakes and bagels
Note :The toaster will not latch if you press the right hand lever first
UK's No. 1 Toaster Brand - Market research institute, retail toasters sales value, October 2023 - September 2024.
description: From the manufacturer About the brand Modern life is so busy that we rarely stop to appreciate things. Nobody has any time anymore. We’re in a social era, but we don’t meet up. Life just goes on at too quick a speed. As a brand, we’re just trying to remind people to slow down, and appreciate the moment more. Whether it’s a moment to celebrate or not, something big or small, every day or once a year, it’s about going round and getting the kettle on, getting together for a brunch, or even just taking a second to reflect. Russell Hobbs Inspire Four Slice White Toaster, 24380 Make a stunning statement on your kitchen counter with the Inspire Four Slice Toaster. Combining a classic, clean white with a strong stainless steel, this toaster adds a touch of class to any kitchen. The Inspire Four Slice Toaster features a distinct premium white plastic with textured ripples. The Inspire Toaster isn’t just stunning in appearance; it’s also striking in performance. Frozen, cancel and reheat settings Lift and Look feature Matching kettle Features Lift and Look Allows you to take a sneak peek at how the browning of your toast is doing, without cancelling the cycle Frozen, cancel and reheat settings Whether you want to toast a slice of bread straight from frozen, save your toast from burning or reheat it on those hectic mornings to a time that’s more convenient for you – it’s all at the press of a button High Lift function Designed to make removing your toast and smaller items such as crumpets, easier without burning your fingertips Blue LED illumination Elegant chrome accents with blue LED indicators adds a touch of style to your kitchen Product Specification Awaken your senses as well as your taste buds every morning at breakfast with the Inspire Four Slice Toaster. With four slots it’s the perfect size to bond over breakfast with those that matter most – your family. So switch off from the world, push down the lever and get back to truly enjoying life with a delicious breakfast and great company. Premium textured plastic Frozen, cancel and reheat settings, with blue indicator lights Lift and look feature High Lift feature Four slots Removable crumb trays Variable browning dial

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Unplug the toaster and let it cool down.Wipe outer surfaces with a damp cloth.Empty crumb tray and wipe clean
specifications_table.Warranty description: ‎2 years plus 1 year when registered online.
